findings.title: Missing RbacDecision Unit Tests
findings.description: No unit tests exist for RbacDecision.java (factory methods allow() and deny())
findings.recommendation: Add RbacDecisionTest.java with tests for allow(), deny(), and edge cases

findings.title: Permission Enum Not Used in I1
findings.description: The Permission enum is defined but not referenced by any other I1 component
findings.recommendation: Verify I2 plan uses Permission enum or remove if unnecessary

findings.title: AuditLogRepository Missing Query Methods for I2
findings.description: Repository lacks findByAction() and findByResult() methods needed for I2 audit logging service
findings.recommendation: Add query methods in I2: findByAction(), findByResult()

findings.title: Component Scan Configuration Not Updated in McpApplication
findings.description: McpApplication.java does not include rbac package in component scan. RbacConfig.java exists but is not imported by McpApplication.
findings.recommendation: Add RbacConfig to @Import in McpApplication.java OR add rbac package scan to relevant profile configs in I2

findings.title: Migration File Location Convention
findings.description: Migration is in rbac/ subdirectory but no master changelog imports it
findings.recommendation: Configure Liquibase to load rbac changelog in I2 via spring.liquibase.change-log property

blockers.title: Component Scan - RBAC beans won't be loaded
blockers.description: RBAC beans won't be loaded without config update in McpApplication
blockers.resolution: RbacConfig.java created in I2 with @ComponentScan - needs to be imported by McpApplication

blockers.title: Liquibase Config - rbac changelog not automatically loaded
blockers.description: rbac changelog not automatically loaded by master changelog
blockers.resolution: Configure spring.liquibase.change-log or include in master changelog in I2

AC-1.prd_criterion: Critical APIs return 403 for unauthorized role access
AC-1.verification_method: N/A - I1 is domain model only
AC-1.evidence: I1 implements database schema and domain model only. AC-1 requires RbacWebFilter which is implemented in I2.

AC-2.prd_criterion: All role operations are logged with timestamp, user, action
evidence: AuditLogEntity.java defines schema with timestamp, actor_namespace, actor_reference, action fields
db.changelog-rbac-001.yaml creates rbac_audit_log table with all required columns
AuditLogRepositoryTest.java: 6/6 tests pass - verifies save/retrieve, metadata JSONB, timestamp range queries, actor queries
AC-2.gaps: Actual logging service (AuditLogService) implemented in I2. I1 provides data layer foundation.

AC-3.prd_criterion: Frontend role guards update within 5 seconds of session change
AC-3.verification_method: N/A - I1 is backend domain model only
AC-3.evidence: I1 contains no frontend code. AC-3 requires I4/I5 (frontend SSE/polling + backend events).
AC-3.traceability: I4 outputs: useRoleGuard.ts, RoleGuard.tsx, profileStore.ts updates

AC-4.verification_method: N/A - I1 has no runtime enforcement
AC-4.evidence: Performance requirements apply to RbacWebFilter and caching layer implemented in I2/I3.
AC-4.traceability: I3 outputs: ProfileRoleService.java with Caffeine cache

test_classes.coverage: Value object validation, null checks, blank checks, toString
Save/retrieve, metadata JSONB, timestamp range queries, actor queries

database_migration.verified: Changelog defines rbac_audit_log table with correct schema matching PRD requirements

dod_evidence: Migration runs successfully (verified by AuditLogRepositoryTest with @DynamicPropertySource)
All domain classes compile with tests (20 tests pass)
Repository can save/retrieve entries (6 repository tests pass)
compliance_assessment.scope_adherence: I1 stayed within boundaries: only database and domain layer, no services or filters

recommendation.rationale: I1 successfully delivers database migration + RBAC domain model as specified. All 20 tests pass. Blockers B1/B2 are configuration issues planned for I2 and do not impact I1's functional completeness. AC-2 foundation is complete (schema, entity, repository).
conditions_for_signoff: I2 must address QB1 (component scan import)
I2 must address QB2 (Liquibase master changelog)
I2 must implement AuditLogService to complete AC-2
recommendation.risk_assessment: LOW - I1 is foundation-only iteration with no runtime impact. Blockers are configuration gaps that prevent bean loading but do not affect I1 deliverables.

next_actions.action: Begin I2: RBAC WebFilter + Audit logging service
Address QB1 (component scan) and QB2 (Liquibase) as part of I2 setup
Add RbacDecisionTest in I2 to address QF1

handoff_notes: I1 is functionally complete and ready for sign-off. Domain model is solid foundation for I2. Blockers are known configuration gaps (component scan, Liquibase) that are explicitly planned for I2. No surprises expected.
